package rulecoverage

func NegativeEcbModeCipher() string {
    ruleID := "ecb_mode_cipher"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "direct use of `cipher.Block.Encrypt` / `cipher.Block.Decrypt` without a block mode wrapper (CBC, CTR, GCM)"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
